sections.paragraph:
πυλών, ῶνος, ὁ [πύλη]

—1. ‘a structure with a gate or gates opening to an area leading up to the main dwelling’, gateway, gate, entrance Lk 16:20; Ac 10:17; 12:13f; 14:13; Rv 21:12 and freq. in Rv.

—2. ext. sense, ‘area serving as forecourt to a courtyard’, gateway, entrance Mt 26:71.
